parameters.name: massive
parameters.description: Indicates if the operation is massive (true) or single (false).

parameters.name: partialChange
parameters.description: Indicates if the operation is a cumulative operation (true), which at the end of the process will invoke again the API with the parameter set to false, or complete (false).

parameters.description: If provided, it will publish into Kafka queue the DebtPosition.
